mapper.select: /* selectOeadjky */ SELECT fn_om_oeadjky() as oeadjky from dual
/*sp_om_oeadji*/ CALL sp_om_oeadji( #{userData.compkey}, #{oeadjky}, #{userData.useract}, #{omsgkey, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oresult, mode=OUT, jdbcType=INTEGER} )
/* selectRsncdnmList */ SELECT rsncode as COMBOVL, rsncdnm as COMBONM FROM MRSCMA WHERE COMPKEY = #{compkey} AND(doctype='310' OR doctype='320') AND doccate='300' AND rscate1= #{rscate1}
/*sp_om_oeadji_cancel*/ CALL sp_om_oeadji_cancel( #{compkey}, #{oeadjky}, #{creuser}, #{omsgkey, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oresult, mode=OUT, jdbcType=INTEGER} )
